name: Church Management
description: Complete church management system — manage members, organize events, track donations and tithes, and oversee ministries with attendance tracking and communication tools.
author: AENEWS

capabilities.name: searchMembers
capabilities.description: Search for church members by name, family, or role

capabilities.name: createEvent
capabilities.description: Create a new church event or service

capabilities.name: getDonation
capabilities.description: Get donation details with donor and purpose

capabilities.name: updateMinistry
capabilities.description: Update ministry details, leaders, or members

capabilities.name: deleteEvent
capabilities.description: Cancel or delete a church event

capabilities.name: getMember
capabilities.description: Get member profile with attendance and giving history

capabilities.name: searchEvents
capabilities.description: Search events by name, date, or type

permissions.name: Read
permissions.description: Read church data including members, events, and donations

permissions.name: Write
permissions.description: Create/Update members, events, donations, and ministries

permissions.name: Delete
permissions.description: Delete members, events, donations, and ministry records

permissions.name: Admin
permissions.description: Full church administration including settings and financial oversight
